title: Principia Omnium Universale: Leonardo da Vinci's Universal Architecture of Motion, Medium and Form
description: Complete doctoral thesis reconstructing the universal mechanical and philosophical architecture of Leonardo da Vinci across the Madrid Codices, Codex Atlanticus, and related manuscripts.

creators.name: Vallance, Richard Steven
creators.affiliation: The People Focused Group, Doncaster, UK
